top_signals.title: Bitcoin Falls Back Toward $60,000 on Strategy Shares, Rate Fears
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin extended its slide back toward the $60,000 level. The decline is driven by mounting concerns over the unraveling of Strategy Inc.’s funding mechanism, alongside rate-hike fears that are dampening demand for riskier assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Cook, The Opportunities and Risks AI Presents for the Economy and Financial System
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Stanford Institute for Economic Policy Research, Stanford University, Stanford, California
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: HIVE secures $220M AI infrastructure contract with Bell and Cohere
top_signals.summary: The deal is expected to add approximately $70 million in annual recurring revenue as the company scales its AI-focused operations.
